commit.message:
test(control-plane): add lease timeout and crash recovery integration tests (T110)

Add 11 integration tests covering the four lease recovery scenarios:
- Heartbeat timeout detection → stale lease reclaim → task retry
- Worker crash → CRASHED lease state → retry or escalate
- Grace period: terminal heartbeat extends expiry, result accepted
- Retry exhaustion → escalation to operator queue

Tests use real SQLite, real services (TransitionService, HeartbeatService,
LeaseReclaimService), and FakeClock for deterministic time control.

Also fixes T111 status discrepancy in backlog index.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix deadlock in RunGitAsync and stale _init-temp cleanup

RunGitAsync awaited stdout then stderr sequentially — deadlocks when
stderr buffer fills (e.g., 35 CRLF warnings from git add). Now reads
both concurrently with Task.WhenAll.

Also clean up stale _init-temp directory if it exists from a previous
interrupted run.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(control-plane): add merge conflict and failure path integration tests (T109)

Add 12 integration tests covering merge failure scenarios:
- Conflict classification policy (reworkable vs non-reworkable)
- Merge executor with reworkable conflict → CHANGES_REQUESTED
- Merge executor with non-reworkable conflict → FAILED
- Post-merge validation severity classification (critical/high/low)
- High severity post-merge failure (operator alert, no queue pause)
- Critical post-merge failure (revert task + queue pause)

Tests use custom UnitOfWork adapters with real SQLite persistence
and fake git/validation ports for deterministic failure scenarios.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Include improver in self-improvement and rollback

The improver now improves its own AGENTS.md alongside coder, tester, and
orchestrator. Regression rollback also covers all four roles.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(control-plane): add escalation trigger and resolution integration tests (T111)

Add 11 integration tests validating escalation trigger scenarios and operator
resolution paths through real SQLite database:

Triggers:
- Max retry exceeded → ESCALATED
- Max review rounds exceeded → ESCALATED
- Policy violation → ESCALATED

Resolutions:
- Operator retry → ASSIGNED (with pool reassignment)
- Operator cancel → CANCELLED
- Operator mark_done → DONE (elevated audit severity)

Invariants:
- Full trigger → resolution cycle audit trail
- Terminal state escalation prevention
- Non-operator resolution rejection
- Domain event emission

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- updates .github/workflows/pull_request_dependabot.yml to use the
scripts and commit generated changes.

commit.message:
Add self-improvement loop (v0.3)

New Phase 4 in the orchestrator iteration cycle: after testing, the
ImprovementAnalyzer evaluates whether AGENTS.md updates are warranted
(skips clean passes). If needed, spawns an improver worker that rewrites
coder/tester/orchestrator AGENTS.md based on metrics, issues, and trends.

Components:
- agents/improver.agents.md: improvement specialist personality
- ImprovementAnalyzer: decides when/what to improve, builds prompts
- Orchestrator: Phase 4 wiring, ParseImproverResponse parser
- Regression rollback now includes orchestrator.agents.md

15 new tests covering ShouldImprove logic, prompt generation, history
trend analysis, recurring issue detection, and response parsing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(web-ui): build task detail timeline view (T095)

Add task detail page with five tabbed sections:
- Overview: all task metadata, classification, criteria, lease, review cycle
- Timeline: chronological audit events with state transitions and actors
- Packets: review cycle packets with expandable JSON syntax highlighting
- Artifacts: hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse navigation
- Dependencies: forward/reverse dependency lists with navigable links

Add /tasks/:id route with lazy loading. Update task table rows to link
to detail page. Add TaskDetail, TaskDependency, TaskLease API types.
Update useTask hook to return enriched TaskDetail.

23 new tests covering all tabs, loading/error/empty states, metadata
display, badge rendering, and navigation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix CRLF noise in cross-platform worker diffs

Add .gitattributes with text=auto normalization. Set core.autocrlf=input
on all workspace clones so Linux containers never commit CRLF line endings.
This prevents every-line diffs when workers modify files seeded from Windows.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Seed workspace from source project directory

Add --source=<path> CLI option that copies project files into the initial
commit of the workspace bare repo. Workers now start with the real codebase
instead of an empty repo, producing directly mergeable changes.

Skips .git/, bin/, obj/, node_modules/, and workspaces/ directories during
copy. The copied .gitignore handles the rest via git add.

commit.message:
feat(web-ui): implement dashboard view with live system health summary

Build the dashboard page (T093) with real-time data from the control-plane API:

- Task summary cards: 4 colour-coded cards showing Active, Queued,
  Completed, and Needs Attention counts aggregated from 15 task statuses
- Worker pool summary: total pools, enabled pools, max concurrency
- Recent activity feed: last 10 audit events with type badges and
  relative timestamps
- Error alert when API is unreachable, loading skeletons, empty states
- Live updates via WebSocket-driven TanStack Query cache invalidation

Implementation uses client-side aggregation with limit=1 queries per
status to efficiently extract total counts without fetching payloads.

21 new tests across 3 test files. All 3,707 tests pass.

commit.message:
feat(web-ui): implement WebSocket client for live updates (T091)

Add socket.io-client integration with React context provider for real-time
event delivery from the control-plane backend.

- WebSocketProvider manages socket.io connection lifecycle (connect,
  reconnect with exponential backoff, disconnect on unmount)
- Auto-subscribes to all event channels (tasks, workers, queue) on connect
- Invalidates TanStack Query caches on factory_event messages using
  channel-level and event-type-specific invalidation mapping
- useWebSocket hook exposes connection state + subscribe/unsubscribe
- ConnectionStatus component updated to three-state enum
  (connected/reconnecting/disconnected) with distinct visual indicators
- App.tsx wraps component tree with WebSocketProvider inside ApiProvider
- AppLayout uses real connection state from useWebSocket()
- 20+ new tests covering invalidation mapping, provider lifecycle, and hook

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Vercel Edge proxy for Meesho (bypasses Akamai block)

New GET /api/admin/proxy-meesho?url=... runs on Vercel Edge Runtime
(Cloudflare Workers infrastructure). Cloudflare IPs are not blocked by
Meesho/Akamai unlike Vercel Node IPs. Browser calls this endpoint,
receives HTML, parses __NEXT_DATA__ locally, saves via scrape-meesho.

Removes broken public CORS proxy approach (allorigins/corsproxy both fail).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: URL auto-import via free CORS proxy (allorigins + corsproxy fallback)

Browser fetches Meesho HTML through allorigins.win / corsproxy.io
(their IPs bypass Akamai). Parses __NEXT_DATA__ / JSON-LD locally.
No server-side fetch, no CF Worker, no API keys needed.

If proxy fails, error message expands a paste-source fallback.

commit.message:
feat(web-ui): implement API client layer with TanStack Query

Add typed fetch wrapper, query key factory, and TanStack Query hooks
for all control-plane API entities (projects, repositories, tasks,
pools, agent profiles, reviews, audit, policies, health).

- Install @tanstack/react-query
- Create src/api/client.ts with typed fetch wrapper (JSON, errors, 204)
- Create src/api/types.ts matching all backend DTOs
- Create src/api/query-keys.ts with hierarchical key factory
- Create src/api/provider.tsx with ApiProvider (30s staleTime, 1 retry)
- Create query + mutation hooks for all entities including 11 operator actions
- Update App.tsx to wrap router with ApiProvider
- Add 11 test files with 67 new tests

Closes T090.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: change Docker WORKDIR to /workspace for persistent storage

Copilot CLI sessions and git clone now land in /workspace, which is
volume-mounted to ~/workspace on the host. Previously WORKDIR was
/home/jetuser (not mounted), so cloned repos were lost on container
restart.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add comprehensive eval & red teaming coverage with naming convention

New scripts:
- 07: RAG offline eval (groundedness, hallucination detection)
- 08: Agent process eval (intent resolution, tool call accuracy)
- 09: Safety suite (7 evaluators: violence, sexual, code vulnerability, etc.)
- 10: Online RAG agent eval (live file search + groundedness)
- 11: Continuous eval demo (sends conversations to trigger monitoring)

Enhanced scripts:
- 01: Added code-based custom evaluator alongside prompt-based
- 06: Added Sexual/Self-Harm risk categories + IndirectJailbreak strategy

Naming convention: [XX] Category - Target for all Foundry portal entries
New datasets: RAG data with hallucinations, safety edge cases, TechVibe handbook

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: replace URL auto-import with paste-HTML import (no external services)

User opens Meesho in a tab, presses Ctrl+U to view source, copies it,
pastes into admin textarea, we parse __NEXT_DATA__ / JSON-LD locally
in the browser, then save via /api/admin/scrape-meesho.

Zero proxies, zero Cloudflare, zero server-side Meesho fetch.
Always works because the browser can access Meesho freely.

fix: server-side CF proxy also reads NEXT_PUBLIC_ env vars

User set NEXT_PUBLIC_CF_PROXY_URL/SECRET in Vercel.
Server route was only checking CF_PROXY_URL/SECRET (no prefix) → skipped.
Now falls back to NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix so both server and browser use same vars.

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): implement escalation resolution flow

Add POST /api/tasks/:id/actions/resolve-escalation endpoint with three
resolution types for handling ESCALATED tasks:

- retry: ESCALATED → ASSIGNED with optional pool reassignment
- cancel: ESCALATED → CANCELLED preserving escalation context
- mark_done: ESCALATED → DONE requiring evidence (elevated audit)

Includes ResolveEscalationDto with Zod cross-field validation,
guardResolveEscalation safety guard, and 19 new tests covering
all resolution paths, audit metadata, and error cases.

Closes T103.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): implement operator action guards for manual overrides

Add safety guards for operator actions that enforce state machine invariants
and system safety constraints before execution:

- force_unblock: validates non-empty reason and BLOCKED state
- reopen: validates no active lease exists (prevents one-active-lease violation)
- cancel: blocks during MERGING; requires acknowledgment for IN_DEVELOPMENT
- override_merge_order: validates QUEUED_FOR_MERGE state

Add elevated audit severity for sensitive actions (force_unblock,
override_merge_order, reopen) via auditSeverity metadata field.

Add acknowledgeInProgressWork field to CancelActionDto for explicit
confirmation when cancelling tasks with active work.

36 new guard tests + all 3,515 existing tests pass.

Closes T102.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: Docker credential management and devtunnel auth docs

- Add GH_TOKEN env var to docker-compose.yml for Copilot CLI + Git auth
- Add env_file support (.env, optional) for secrets outside repo
- Add git-credential-env helper to Dockerfile for GH_TOKEN-based Git auth
- Rewrite infra/README.md auth section with PAT-based workflow
- Document Dev Tunnels Microsoft personal account as recommended auth
- Note GitHub auth 403 known issue (microsoft/dev-tunnels#578)
- Fix devtunnel login flag: -m is deprecated, use -e for Entra/Microsoft
- Fix infra/README.md volume table: devtunnel path is ~/DevTunnels not ~/.devtunnels

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): implement domain event broadcasting to WebSocket clients

Wire DomainEventEmitter port to EventBroadcasterService via
DomainEventBroadcasterAdapter. All state transitions from the
TransitionService now broadcast real-time events to connected
WebSocket clients.

- Create DomainEventBroadcasterAdapter implementing DomainEventEmitter
- Map domain events to EventChannel + FactoryEvent for socket.io delivery
- Register adapter in EventsModule, inject into OperatorActionsService
- 14 tests covering all entity types, error handling, type mapping

Closes T087.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: redesign UI with space-themed splash screen and mission control panel

- Add SplashScreen with animated orbiting satellite around Earth
- Rewrite HomeScreen as mission control panel with:
  - AppBar with live ONLINE/OFFLINE connection chip
  - Popup menu for SSH connect/disconnect/edit/settings
  - Quick SSH dialog pre-filled from saved settings
  - Action tiles with per-button loading spinners
  - Sectioned layout: Visualization, Screen Overlay, Cleanup
  - Terminal output panel showing live status messages
- Update main.dart to use SplashScreen as entry point
- All existing backend controllers (SSH, Settings, LG) unchanged

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): implement WebSocket gateway for live events (T086)

Add real-time event delivery infrastructure using socket.io via NestJS
@WebSocketGateway. Implements:

- EventsGateway: connection management, channel subscriptions, room-based
  event routing for tasks/workers/queue channels
- EventBroadcasterService: public API for other modules to emit events
  to channel rooms and entity-specific rooms
- EventsModule: registered in AppModule, exports EventBroadcasterService
- 24 tests covering connection lifecycle, subscriptions, broadcasting,
  validation, and graceful error handling

Unblocks T087 (task events), T088 (queue/worker events), T091 (WS client).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(observability): implement Prometheus metrics endpoint (T078)

- Add prom-client-backed metrics module in @factory/observability with
  Registry init, default Node.js metrics, and counter/histogram/gauge
  factory functions following §10.13 naming and label conventions
- Add NestJS MetricsController (GET /metrics) with MetricsModule in
  apps/control-plane, registered in AppModule
- Export METRICS_HANDLE DI token for other modules to register custom
  metrics (needed by T079)
- 17 new tests: 14 for metrics core, 3 for controller
- Fix T072 backlog index status (was pending, task file was done)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(infrastructure): implement crash recovery infrastructure adapters (T072)

Implement infrastructure adapters for partial work snapshot capture during
lease reclaim. Three adapters created in packages/infrastructure/src/crash-recovery/:

- WorkspaceInspector: reads filesystem-persisted result packets, git diffs,
  modified file lists, and output files from crashed workspaces
- CrashRecoveryArtifactAdapter: stores crash recovery artifacts via ArtifactStore
  using the §7.11 directory layout (runs/{runId}/outputs/)
- ResultPacketValidator: validates result packet content against DevResultPacketSchema

Added @factory/application as dependency to @factory/infrastructure for port
interface imports (valid inward dependency in clean architecture).

33 new tests covering all adapters with FakeFileSystem and FakeGitDiffProvider.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): implement operator action API endpoints

Implement all 10 operator actions from PRD §6.2 as REST endpoints:
- State transitions: pause, resume, requeue, force-unblock, cancel
- Metadata: change-priority, reassign-pool
- Overrides: rerun-review, reopen, override-merge-order

All actions validate preconditions, create audit events with
actorType=operator, and respect state machine invariants.
34 unit tests with in-memory SQLite.

Closes T101.

feat(application): implement summarization packet generation for retries

Implement T071: SummarizationService that condenses failed-run artifacts
into bounded (~2000 char) retry summaries for TaskPacket.context.prior_partial_work.

- Add SummarizationArtifactReaderPort/WriterPort with best-effort reads
- Add RetrySummary, SummaryFileChange, SummaryValidation, FailedRunInfo types
- Extract files changed, validations, failure points from DevResultPacket
  and/or PartialWorkSnapshot with graceful fallback
- Progressive truncation to enforce 2000-char limit
- OTel tracing via @factory/observability
- 28 tests covering all extraction paths and size enforcement

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): implement audit, policy, and config API endpoints

Implement T085: REST endpoints for audit event queries, policy set
management, and effective configuration inspection.

Endpoints added:
- GET /audit — search audit events with multi-criteria filters
- GET /tasks/:id/timeline — task audit event timeline
- GET /policies — list policy sets with pagination
- GET /policies/:id — get policy set by ID
- PUT /policies/:id — update policy set
- GET /config/effective — resolve hierarchical config with source tracking

This completes E017 (REST API Layer), unblocking E018 (Real-time Events).

32 new tests added (3,300 total, all passing).

Add REST endpoints for retrieving task artifacts, review history,
review cycle packets, parsed packet content, and merge details.

Endpoints:
- GET /tasks/:taskId/artifacts - artifact tree organized by type
- GET /tasks/:taskId/packets/:packetId - parsed JSON packet content
- GET /tasks/:taskId/reviews - review cycle history with decisions
- GET /tasks/:taskId/reviews/:cycleId/packets - specialist packets
- GET /tasks/:taskId/merge - merge queue item + validation runs

New files:
- review/artifacts.controller.ts + artifacts.service.ts
- review/reviews.controller.ts + reviews.service.ts
- merge/merge-details.controller.ts + merge-details.service.ts
- 6 test files with 31 new tests (3,268 total passing)

commit.message:
feat(application): implement follow-up task generation service

Implement centralized FollowUpTaskService (T068) that creates follow-up
tasks from four source types:

- Review follow-ups: from approved_with_follow_up decisions
- Revert tasks: from critical/high post-merge failures
- Diagnostic tasks: from low-severity post-merge failures
- Hotfix tasks: from analysis agent recommendations

All follow-ups enter BACKLOG state with relates_to dependency on the
source task. Uses discriminated union for type-safe source routing,
blueprint pattern for metadata construction, and UnitOfWork for atomic
task + dependency + audit creation.

Includes 26 tests covering all follow-up types, dependencies, audit
trail, domain events, error handling, and atomicity.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): implement WorkerPool and AgentProfile REST endpoints

Add CRUD endpoints for worker pool management (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /pools)
and agent profile management nested under pools (/pools/:id/profiles).

Pool detail endpoint enriches responses with live worker counts and
attached agent profiles. Profile operations enforce pool ownership on
all reads, writes, and deletes.

Includes 48 new tests: controller unit tests with mocked services and
service integration tests with in-memory SQLite.

Closes T083.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(application): implement squash and merge-commit strategies

Add squash and merge-commit strategies alongside rebase-and-merge in the
merge executor (T065). The merge executor now dispatches to strategy-
specific git operations and pushes the correct branch per strategy.

Changes:
- Add squashMerge() and mergeCommit() to MergeGitOperationsPort
- Add mergeStrategy param to ExecuteMergeParams (defaults to rebase-and-merge)
- Dispatch Phase 3 git operations based on strategy
- Push source branch for rebase-and-merge, target branch for squash/merge-commit
- Record chosen strategy and rebase_performed flag in MergePacket
- 12 new tests covering all strategies, conflicts, and push branch logic

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: move git clone from cloud-init to deploy.sh post-deploy

cloud-init was failing on private repos (no auth).

New flow:
- cloud-init: installs Docker + creates directories only
- deploy.sh: waits for cloud-init, then clones repo + builds image
  via az vm run-command (supports PAT in URL for private repos)

Also fixed Ubuntu image reference for Bicep (ubuntu-24_04-lts/server).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(application): implement workspace reconciliation service (T042)

Add WorkspaceReconciliationService that periodically scans for expired and
orphaned workspaces and cleans them up automatically using a self-rescheduling
job pattern with JobType.CLEANUP.

- New ports: ExpiredWorkspaceQueryPort, WorkspaceDirectoryScannerPort,
  CleanupJobQueryPort, WorkspaceReconciliationUnitOfWork
- Service uses isWorkspaceCleanupEligible() from domain for retention policy
- Error-isolated per-workspace cleanup (one failure doesn't block others)
- Default 1-hour interval, configurable via WorkspaceReconciliationConfig
- 29 new tests covering initialization, self-rescheduling, expired cleanup,
  orphan detection, error isolation, and combined scenarios

fix: Docker build on Linux - restore Python, make screenshots optional

- Docker build now succeeds on Linux

feat(observability): implement structured logging with correlation IDs

- Add pino-based structured JSON logger with §7.14 common fields
- Add AsyncLocalStorage correlation context (taskId, runId, workerId, etc.)
- Add NestJS LoggerService adapter for framework integration
- Support per-module log level configuration
- Output structured JSON to stdout (containerization-friendly)
- 28 tests across context, logger, and NestJS adapter modules

Closes T075

commit.message:
feat(infrastructure): implement workspace cleanup for terminal states

Add cleanupWorkspace() to WorkspaceManager that removes git worktrees,
deletes workspace directories, and optionally deletes task branches.
All operations are idempotent for crash recovery safety.

Infrastructure changes:
- GitOperations: add removeWorktree(), deleteBranch() methods
- FileSystem: add rm() method for directory removal
- WorkspaceManager: add cleanupWorkspace() with CleanupWorkspaceOptions/Result
- exec-git-operations: implement removeWorktree (git worktree remove --force)
  and deleteBranch (git branch -d/-D) with idempotent error handling
- node-fs: implement rm() wrapping fs/promises rm with ENOENT tolerance

Domain changes:
- Add isWorkspaceCleanupEligible() pure function encoding PRD §2.9 rules:
  terminal state check, ESCALATED retention, FAILED workspace retention,
  workspace_retention_hours period enforcement

Application changes:
- WorkspaceProviderPort: add cleanupWorkspace() with SupervisorCleanupOptions/Result
- FakeWorkspaceManager: add TrackedCleanup records, result-returning cleanup

39 new tests (3,094 total): domain eligibility (14), workspace manager
cleanup (10), git operations integration (6), fake manager updates (9).

Closes T041.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add Docker + Azure VM deployment infrastructure

Dockerfile:
- Multi-stage build: node:22-slim + build-essential for node-pty
- Copilot CLI + Dev Tunnels CLI pre-installed
- Non-root user (jetuser)

docker-compose.yml:
- Volume mounts: ~/workspace, ~/.copilot, ~/.devtunnels
- restart: unless-stopped

infra/main.bicep:
- Azure VM (Ubuntu 24.04, Standard_B2s)
- Azure Bastion Developer SKU (free, no public IP)
- VNet + NSG (no inbound ports)
- Auto-shutdown schedule

infra/cloud-init.yaml:
- Docker Engine auto-install
- jet-copilot clone + docker compose up

infra/deploy.sh + infra/README.md:
- One-command deployment script
- Full setup and operation documentation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
